mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, policy_code, policy_name, subject_expr, resource_expr, action_expr, effect, priority, status, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM abac_policy WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO abac_policy ( tenant_id, policy_code, policy_name, subject_expr, resource_expr, action_expr, effect, priority, status ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{policyCode}, #{policyName}, #{subjectExpr, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.shared.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{resourceExpr, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.shared.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{actionExpr, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.shared.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{effect}, #{priority}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE abac_policy SET policy_code = #{policyCode}, policy_name = #{policyName}, subject_expr = #{subjectExpr, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.shared.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, resource_expr = #{resourceExpr, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.shared.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, action_expr = #{actionExpr, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.shared.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, effect = #{effect}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
